features: Give eyes their best ever beauty sleep! - With our Face Facts Brightening Under-Eye Gel Patches, help to reduce pigmentation & improve skin elasticity, brightening the appearance of tired eyes.
Below our peepers the skin is ultra-delicate - With fewer oil glands much drier, meaning every little annoying fine line or puffiness is starring back at you
The solution, these little under-eye patches - They feel just like cooling juicy jelly when applied and packed full of super-skin ingredients.
Infused with a cocktail of skin hero's - Vit C to brighten the appearance of tired eye and Collagen, Glycerin & Hyaluronic that will help smooth, plump + deliver hyper hydration.
Top Tip - Pop in your fridge for an even more dreamy dewy treatment!
description: Product Description Our under-eye gel patches are infused with a cocktail of skin hero's. Vitamin C to brighten the appearance of tired eyes and Collagen, Glycerin & Hyaluronic that will all help to smooth, plump + deliver hyper hydration. Ingredients Liquid: Aqua, Glycerin, Dimethicone, Paraffinum Liquidum, Cetearyl Alcohol, Isopropyl Palmitate, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Propylene Glycol, Sorbitan Stearate, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Phenoxyethanol. Gel Patch: Aqua, Glycerin, Chondrus Crispus Extract, Hydrolyzed Sclerotium Gum, Xanthan Gum, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Phenoxyethanol. Safety Warning For external use only, do not ingest. Use immediately after opening. Do not use on irritated or broken skin. Do not use on open wounds, cuts or grazes. In the unlikely event you may suffer an adverse reaction to this product, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice. If product gets into the eyes, flush with clean water. Keep out of reach of children. Please retain information for future reference. Store in a cool, dry place. Keep out of direct sunlight. Do not freeze. See more
